International Women's Day · 8 March 2026

A Woman's Dream
Changing What You Eat

Today, Ashwini Ghanwat — a farmer's daughter from the Sahyadri hills — officially launches Shivar Farmfresh. Her mission: every Indian family deserves food that's pure, honest and traceable. From our farm to your family, with love.

👩‍🌾
🚀 Launched
8 March 2026
Women Entrepreneur
✦ The Founder

Meet Ashwini Ghanwat

"Every family deserves immunity they can trust — not from a pill, but from the earth itself. I watched our farm's pure turmeric get replaced by adulterated powder. That broke my heart. That lit my fire."

Growing up among the golden turmeric fields of Wai-Satara, Ashwini watched generations of Sahyadri farmers lose their livelihoods to a broken supply chain riddled with middlemen and adulteration. She made a decision: bring the farm directly to every kitchen.

On International Women's Day, 8 March 2026, Ashwini officially launches Shivar Farmfresh — a farm-direct brand with a mission to reach every household in India, and eventually the world.

🌿 Farm-Direct ✅ FSSAI Certified 🏔️ Sahyadri Origin 🚫 Zero Adulteration 💛 Women-Led Brand
Ashwini Ghanwat
Founder & CEO · Shivar Farmfresh · अश्विनी घणवट
✦ Why We Exist

Three Unbreakable Promises

🛡️
Zero Adulteration

Every Shivar batch is traceable to the exact farm plot in Wai-Satara. What you see on the label is the only thing in the packet. No starch, no artificial colour, no sawdust. Ever.

💪
Immunity is a Right

As climate change brings new health challenges, Ashwini believes nature's best defence — curcumin-rich turmeric — should be affordable and accessible to every single family.

🌍
Farmer First. Always.

By removing every middleman, Shivar Farmfresh puts fair income directly in the hands of the Sahyadri farmers who grow the turmeric. Your purchase funds a family, not a warehouse chain.

✦ The Road So Far

Ashwini's Journey

01
🌱
Growing Up
Turmeric Fields of Wai-Satara

Ashwini grows up in the Sahyadri hills, watching her family grow high-curcumin turmeric but selling it at throwaway prices to middlemen who profit from the purity.

Sahyadri, Maharashtra
02
😤
The Realization
Adulteration Hits Home

Discovering that popular branded turmeric contains artificial colour, starch and sawdust, Ashwini makes a personal commitment: never sell anything but pure, honest turmeric.

The Turning Point
03
💡
The Vision
Immunity as a Mission

As climate change brings new health threats, the Shivar Farmfresh concept is born — farm-direct, FSSAI certified, zero compromise. The farm-to-door vision takes shape.

Farm-to-Door Concept
04
🚀
8 March 2026 · Today
Shivar Farmfresh is Born!

On Women's Day, Ashwini launches Shivar Farmfresh. FSSAI certified. Four pack sizes. Pan-India shipping. The mission begins: reach every Indian family with pure turmeric.

🎉 Launched Today!
05
🇮🇳
2027 Vision
Pan-India Presence

Partnerships with organic stores, D2C platforms, and health brands across every major Indian city. Goal: 10,000 families using Shivar turmeric daily.

Next Milestone
06
🌏
2030 · The Big Dream
Global Families. Immune. Unafraid.

Sahyadri turmeric in kitchens across the US, UK, UAE, Australia and Southeast Asia. Not just a spice export — a global immunity movement for every family in every climate.

🌍 Farm to Globe · 2030

In GitHub, open index.html → find class="ig-grid" → replace that div with the Elfsight embed code

Done! Your real posts auto-update every time you post ✅

📌 Add your YouTube video:
Upload to YouTube → Share → Embed → Copy VIDEO_ID from URL
In GitHub, find id="ytPlayerBox" → replace its content with:
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID" style="width:100%;height:100%;border:none;border-radius:18px" allowfullscreen></iframe>

✦ Our Products

Choose Your Pack

All packs contain the same premium 3–5% curcumin turmeric. Bigger pack = better value per gram.

✦ Why Shivar Farmfresh

Not Just Turmeric — It's Science

🔬
3–5% Curcumin

Standard market turmeric: 1–2% curcumin. Ours: 3–5%. That's up to 3× more active healing compound per spoon you use.

🏔️
Single Origin

Grown exclusively in mineral-rich Wai-Satara, Sahyadri. Traceable to the exact farm plot. No blending with inferior batches.

🌱
Zero Chemicals

No pesticides. No fillers. No preservatives. No artificial colour. The ingredient list has exactly one item: turmeric.

✅
FSSAI Certified

Fully licensed, fully compliant. FSSAI No. 21524039000444. Processed at Yashoda Agro Food Processing, Wai.

🚚
Direct from Farm

No retail markup, no middlemen. Order today → packed fresh → shipped directly to your door across India.

👨‍👩‍👧
Safe for All Ages

Children (3+), adults, seniors. Golden milk, curries, warm water. Fits every routine, every kitchen, every family.
